faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.browseOfficialWebsite: Browse FAQs on our official website for detailed guidance and assistance.
faq.linkUnavailable: Could not open the FAQs page. Please visit kochgourmet.com/faqs in your browser.
faq.a1: To start investing, complete your KYC verification, add a payment method, and browse available projects. You can invest with as little as $500 in most projects.
faq.a2: KYC (Know Your Customer) is an identity verification process required by law. We use Sumsub, a secure third-party provider, to verify your identity quickly and safely.
faq.a3: Returns are calculated based on the property's performance, rental income, and appreciation. You'll receive detailed reports showing how your investment is performing.
faq.a4: Yes, you can transfer tokens to other wallets using our secure transfer feature. Go to the Transfer tab and follow the instructions.
faq.a5: We accept major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) and bank transfers. You can manage your payment methods in Account Settings.
faq.q6: How do I withdraw my investment?
faq.a6: Withdrawals depend on the project terms. Most projects have a minimum holding period. Check your investment details for specific withdrawal conditions.
